query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN wl.status = 'occupied' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inventory i WHERE i.locationId = wl.id AND i.quantity > 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as occupied_sem_estoque,
  SUM(CASE WHEN wl.status = 'available' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inventory i WHERE i.locationId = wl.id AND i.quantity > 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as available_com_estoque,
  COUNT(*) as total_enderecos
FROM warehouseLocations wl;

SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN wl.status = 'occupied' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inventory i WHERE i.locationId = wl.id AND i.quantity > 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as occupied_sem_estoque,
  SUM(CASE WHEN wl.status = 'available' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inventory i WHERE i.locationId = wl.id AND i.quantity > 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as available_com_estoque,
  COUNT(*) as total_enderecos
FROM warehouseLocations wl;
